meta._invariant: Same real Stream xUSD unbacked breach as xUSD.json (Ethereum supply REAL @ block 23725820; cross-chain supply + backing/NAV researcher-asserted) WITH the recursive-mint growth series that produced it. supply_samples are the home (Ethereum) xUSD supply ramping then spiking +~24M in the final window as the position was looped/re-minted (decimals=6) — the recursive minting that created the unbacked state. This makes the snapshot fire BOTH d09 UNBACKED_SUPPLY and d10 SUPPLY_DELTA_ANOMALY (the ongoing-mint corroborator), as actually happened. Used for the multi-poll persistence case: the breach did not clear (it persisted ~a week before the depeg), so across polls past the settlement window the corroborated breach escalates to a CRITICAL page.

metadata._fidelity: ethereum supply REAL (block 23725820); other-chain supply + backing(NAV) researcher-asserted; supply_samples model the real recursive-mint ramp to the measured 85.818938309987M Ethereum supply (decimals=6), final-window loop spike. Confidence MEDIUM. See EVENT.md.
